top_signals.title: Imposter scams led fraud reports to the FTC for fifth straight year in 2025, causing $3.5 billion in losses
top_signals.summary: The amount lost to imposter scams is part of $15.9 billion in total fraud losses reported to the Federal Trade Commission in 2025
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, Welcome Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech At the State of Small Business Symposium hosted by the Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bosch CEO Unexpectedly Leaves World’s Biggest Car-Parts Maker
top_signals.summary: Robert Bosch GmbH Chief Executive Officer Stefan Hartung is stepping down after leading a push to cut thousands of jobs and make the world’s biggest automotive supplier more competitive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
